arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim risks wrath of Manchester United fans with four-word warning
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has won two games and drawn another, to banish Manchester United's early season woes under former boss Erik ten Hag and give fans a glimpse of a brighter future

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes big Bukayo Saka claim after Ballon d'Or talk prediction
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has overseen Bukayo Saka's transformation from left back to one of the world's best right wingers ahead of Arsenal's Premier League meeting with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confident Amad will sign a new contract
arts.sum: He told the upcoming edition of Inside United that he is happy to play anywhere for the Reds, even telling the head coach that he would don the gloves and go in goal for him! "I think that’s one of the great advantages of Amad," added the Portuguese.

arts.ttl: 'A storm will come' - Ruben Amorim issues Manchester United warning
arts.sum: Arsenal are unbeaten against Man United in their past six games at the Emirates Stadium and won both of their games last week with five-goal hauls.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim vows to ‘find solution’ to keep reinvented Amad Diallo at Manchester United
arts.sum: Diallo is out of contract at the end of the season but has starred in a new role since Amorim’s arrival as manager

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim issues storm warning after smooth start with Manchester United
arts.sum: A draw at Ipswich in Amorim’s first game was followed by home wins against Bodo/Glimt and Everton.

arts.ttl: How Ruben Amorim’s Man Utd challenge is even greater than Mikel Arteta’s
arts.sum: Amorim has spoken of his admiration for Arteta and while he can take some learnings from the Arsenal boss, there’s even more for the Portuguese to do at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Amorim urges Man Utd caution: The storm will come, we will be found out
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has warned difficult days still lie ahead for Manchester United and they will be "found out" in some matches - with the Portuguese coach predicting "the storm will come" as he tries to put his stamp on the team.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy creates Premier League history with Leicester after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: LEICESTER CITY 3-1 WEST HAM UNITED: Ruud van Nistelrooy enjoyed a stellar start to life as Foxes boss and has made Premier League history after beating them twice earlier this season while at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warns Man United stars 'the storm will come' as Portuguese admits his unbeaten start will eventually come to an end ahead of Arsenal acid test
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ruben Amorim has earned a reputation for many talents during a relatively short coaching career. Tactician, motivator and even poet, if you listen to Cristiano Ronaldo.
